nodes.name: 鸽属
nodes.summary: 鸽属（Columba）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联32种鸟类，如德氏鸽、Western bronze-naped pigeon、黑林鸽等32种鸟类。

nodes.name: Andaman wood pigeon
nodes.summary: Andaman wood pigeon（Columba palumboides）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Andaman wood pigeon。

nodes.name: 鸽形目
nodes.summary: 鸽形目（Columbiformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联299种鸟类，如Purple-winged ground dove、Moreno's ground dove、Black-winged ground dove等299种鸟类。

nodes.name: Andaman wood pigeon
nodes.summary: The Andaman wood pigeon (Columba palumboides) is a species of bird in the family Columbidae. It is endemic to the Andaman and Nicobar Islands in India. Classified as 'near threatened' by the IUCN, its population is estimated as between 2,500 and 10,000 mature individuals. Description Its head is white with a red yellow-tipped beak with red claws. The rest of its body is black. It is related to the green imperial pigeon and the rock dove. It can mostly be found on North Passage Island. References External links Andaman Wood Pigeon Breed Guide from Pigeonpedia.com
